goal: linear_map_kernel_quotient_add[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a), linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, b)) = linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a + b)

linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_add[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a), linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, b))) = linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a + b))

f(a) + f(b) = linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a)) + linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, b))

linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_add[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a), linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, b))) = f(a) + f(b)
linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced_add
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1) { linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, x3)) = x2(x3) }[R, M, N](src, dst, f, b)

function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1) { linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, x3)) = x2(x3) }[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a)

goal: linear_map_kernel_quotient_neg[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a)) = linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, -a)

linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_neg[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a))) = linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, -a))
-f(a) = -linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a))
linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_neg[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a))) = -f(a)
linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced_neg
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1) { linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, x3)) = x2(x3) }[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a)

goal: linear_map_kernel_quotient_smul[R, M, N](src, dst, f, r, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a)) = linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, src.smul(r, a))

linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_smul[R, M, N](src, dst, f, r, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a))) = linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, src.smul(r, a)))
dst.smul(r, f(a)) = dst.smul(r, linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a)))
linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_smul[R, M, N](src, dst, f, r, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a))) = dst.smul(r, f(a))
linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced_smul
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2, x3: T1) { linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2, x3)) = x2(x3) }[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a)

goal: linear_map_kernel_quotient_zero[R, M, N](src, dst, f) = linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, M.0)

linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_zero[R, M, N](src, dst, f)) = linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, M.0))
linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced[R, M, N](src, dst, f, linear_map_kernel_quotient_zero[R, M, N](src, dst, f)) = f(M.0)
linear_map_kernel_quotient_induced_zero
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: AddCommGroup, T2: AddCommGroup](x0: Module[T0, T1], x1: Module[T0, T2], x2: T1 -> T2) { not is_linear_map[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) or T2.0 = x2(T1.0) }[R, M, N](src, dst, f)

linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, M.0) = linear_map_kernel_quotient_project[R, M, N](src, dst, f, a) = (N.0 = f(a))
